opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: No booking tool detected and website domain is parked for sale on HugeDomains.
opportunities.observation: Mainstream Plumbing has no web presence to capture after-hours Boise plumbing leads.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI booking widget on a new site to capture and confirm jobs 24/7.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and the business website is completely non-functional.
opportunities.observation: Every inbound call from 89 Google reviews worth of traffic is untracked and potentially lost.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture with automatic CRM logging to recover every missed Boise lead.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 4.6 rating across 89 reviews with no detectable owner response activity or reputation tools.
opportunities.observation: Unresponded reviews signal disengagement to prospective Boise customers comparing local plumbers.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized AI responses to new reviews within hours to protect the 4.6 rating.
